top3.sql:
SELECT u.DisplayName, b.Name AS Badge
FROM users u
JOIN (
    SELECT UserId, COUNT(*) AS CommentCount
    FROM comments
    GROUP BY UserId
    ORDER BY CommentCount DESC
    LIMIT 1
) c ON u.Id = c.UserId
JOIN badges b ON u.Id = b.UserId;

SELECT u.DisplayName, b.Name
FROM comments c
JOIN users u ON c.UserId = u.Id
JOIN badges b ON u.Id = b.UserId
GROUP BY c.UserId, u.DisplayName, b.Name
ORDER BY COUNT(c.Id) DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT u.DisplayName, b.Name AS Badge
FROM users u
JOIN (
    SELECT UserId, COUNT(*) AS CommentCount
    FROM comments
    GROUP BY UserId
    ORDER BY CommentCount DESC
    LIMIT 1
) c ON u.Id = c.UserId
JOIN badges b ON u.Id = b.UserId;

SELECT u.DisplayName, b.Name
FROM comments c
JOIN users u ON c.UserId = u.Id
JOIN badges b ON u.Id = b.UserId
WHERE c.UserId IN (
    SELECT UserId
    FROM comments
    GROUP BY UserId
    ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
    LIMIT 10
)
GROUP BY u.DisplayName, b.Name
ORDER BY (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM comments c2
    WHERE c2.UserId = u.Id
) DESC, u.DisplayName, b.Name;

SELECT u.DisplayName, b.Name AS Badge
FROM users u
JOIN badges b ON u.Id = b.UserId
WHERE u.Id IN (
    SELECT UserId
    FROM comments
    GROUP BY UserId
    ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
    LIMIT 1
);

SELECT u.DisplayName, b.Name AS Badge
FROM users u
JOIN (
    SELECT UserId, COUNT(*) AS CommentCount
    FROM comments
    GROUP BY UserId
    ORDER BY CommentCount DESC
    LIMIT 1
) c ON u.Id = c.UserId
JOIN badges b ON u.Id = b.UserId;

SELECT u.DisplayName, b.Name
FROM comments c
JOIN users u ON c.UserId = u.Id
JOIN badges b ON u.Id = b.UserId
WHERE c.UserId IN (
    SELECT UserId
    FROM comments
    GROUP BY UserId
    ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
    LIMIT 10
)
GROUP BY u.DisplayName, b.Name
ORDER BY (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM comments c2
    WHERE c2.UserId = u.Id
) DESC, u.DisplayName, b.Name;

SELECT u.DisplayName, b.Name AS Badge
FROM users u
JOIN badges b ON u.Id = b.UserId
WHERE u.Id IN (
    SELECT UserId
    FROM comments
    GROUP BY UserId
    ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
    LIMIT 1
);

final.sql:
SELECT u.DisplayName, b.Name AS Badge
FROM users u
JOIN (
    SELECT UserId, COUNT(*) AS CommentCount
    FROM comments
    GROUP BY UserId
    ORDER BY CommentCount DESC
    LIMIT 1
) c ON u.Id = c.UserId
JOIN badges b ON u.Id = b.UserId;
